videos.title: Accessible Forms: The Complete Guide
videos.description: Comprehensive guide to building accessible forms covering labels, fieldset, ARIA attributes, error handling, and keyboard navigation.

videos.title: HTML Forms Accessibility Tutorial
videos.description: Learn how to make HTML forms accessible with proper labeling, focus management, and screen reader compatibility.

videos.title: Accessible Forms with ARIA
videos.description: Kevin Powell demonstrates ARIA attributes for accessible forms including aria-describedby, aria-invalid, and aria-live regions.

videos.title: Web Accessibility: Forms and Controls
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers web accessibility for forms including WCAG criteria, screen reader testing, and practical implementation.

videos.title: Building Accessible Custom Form Controls
videos.description: Learn how to build fully accessible custom form controls including select dropdowns, toggle switches, and slider inputs.

videos.title: WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices for Forms
videos.description: Overview of WAI-ARIA authoring practices for accessible form patterns including combobox, slider, and switch.

videos.title: Screen Reader Testing for Forms
videos.description: Learn how to test your forms with screen readers including NVDA and VoiceOver to ensure accessibility compliance.
